description_long: This object is a modern vehicle wheel featuring a black rubber tire mounted on a sleek, multi-spoke alloy rim. The tire has a directional tread pattern with prominent grooves and sipes, designed for effective water displacement and traction on urban roads. The rim is finished in a glossy black, with ten slender spokes radiating symmetrically from the central hub, giving it a sporty and high-performance appearance. The central hub area is exposed, showing the lug nut holes arranged in a circular pattern, with no hubcap present. The sidewalls of the tire are smooth, with some branding or text visible along the outer edge. The overall construction suggests durability and style, suitable for use on cars in city environments.
description: A glossy black vehicle wheel with a directional tread tire and a ten-spoke alloy rim, featuring exposed lug nuts and no hubcap. The design is sporty and modern, ideal for urban vehicles.
description_view_0: Side view of the tire showing the full width and detailed tread pattern, with no rim or spokes visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the glossy black rim with ten slender spokes and exposed lug nut holes, as well as the tire's branding on the sidewall.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of the tire, again highlighting the tread pattern and width, with no rim or spokes visible.
description_view_3: Rear view of the wheel, showing the back of the rim and the spoke arrangement, with the central hub area visible.
attribute_spoke_pattern: Ten evenly spaced, slender spokes arranged radially from the hub to the rim, forming a star-like pattern with a modern, sporty aesthetic.
attribute_rim_design: Glossy black alloy rim with a deep lip and a clean, minimalist profile; no beadlock or multi-piece construction visible, and the rim edge is smooth with subtle branding.
attribute_lug_nut_configuration: Five lug nut holes arranged in a circular, evenly spaced pattern around the central hub, with no cover or decorative cap.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: Directional tread pattern with prominent longitudinal grooves and angled sipes, optimized for water evacuation and urban road grip.
